phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a tour of the Palace of Nations
phrases.text_local: Comment réserver une visite guidée du Palais des Nations ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MOHN ray-zair-VAY oon vee-ZEET gee-DAY doo pah-LAY day nah-SYOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Tours of the Palais des Nations must be booked online in advance. Visitors must bring a valid photo ID; the site has strict security measures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the entrance for visitors is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'entrée pour les visiteurs du Palais des Nations ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lon-TRAY poor lay vee-zee-TUR doo pah-LAY day nah-SYOHN
phrases.cultural_note: The public entrance is on Avenue de la Paix. Allow extra time for the security check, especially during major international conferences.

responses.english: Pregny Gate, Avenue de la Paix.
responses.phonetic: PORT preh-NYEE, av-NOO duh lah PEH
responses.french: Porte Pregny, avenue de la Paix.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the guided tour takes
phrases.text_local: La visite guidée dure combien de temps ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah vee-ZEET ghee-DAY DOOR kohm-BYEHN duh TAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours of the Palais des Nations last about one hour and are available in multiple languages.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if a passport or ID is needed for the visit
phrases.text_local: Faut-il une pièce d'identité pour la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: foh-TEEL oon PYES dee-dahn-tee-TAY poor lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: A valid passport or national ID card is required for all visitors to the Palais des Nations.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a gift shop at the Palais des Nations
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une boutique de souvenirs ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon boo-TEEK duh soov-NEER
phrases.cultural_note: The UN gift shop sells official UN merchandise, stamps, and postcards.

responses.english: Yes, at the end of the tour.
responses.phonetic: wee, ah lah sor-TEE duh lah vee-ZEET
responses.french: Oui, à la sortie de la visite.
